description: UK's first platform to provide video consultations via smartphone. Now part of Square Health, serving both NHS patients and private patients. CQC-rated Outstanding.
business_model: B2B2C - NHS partnerships + Private pay; B2B for corporate health
target_market: UK consumers via NHS; corporate clients for employee health
competitive_advantage: First-mover in UK telemedicine, NHS partnerships, CQC Outstanding rating

varden_fit.rationale: UK market entry partner - established NHS relationships and regulatory compliance
